title: Better Clearer Glass
description: Adds clearer glass to vanilla Minecraft.
body:
# Better Clearer Glass
This is a very simple pack that add clearer glass to minecraft. It was originally part of [Energy Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/energy-shaders-java), but it was split into two packs, so that each can be enabled and disabled individually.

![Stained Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36f2258c1ee34d34b47ec1e16082a0fc1ea36082.png)

## With [Energy Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/energy-shaders-java)
![With Energy Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ab9ca12ad9cedf93a790d3ec05cd40b8c6ebad.png)

## No Continuity/Optifine support
This pack does not use any special Continuity or Optifine features. Personally, I like to use this pack when Continuity has not yet been updated to the newest Minecraft version.
